Class PluralUtils

java.lang.Object
com.lwidev.survisland.api.utils.PluralUtils
public final class PluralUtils extends Object
French singular/plural agreement, so nobody has to hand-roll "(s)" suffixes at each call site.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static String
    agree(long count, String singular)
    Same as agree(long, String, String), assuming a regular plural (just add an "s").
    static String
    agree(long count, String singular, String plural)
    The singular or plural form of a word, agreeing with count (plural for every count but 1 and -1).
    static String
    withCount(long count, String singular)
    Same as withCount(long, String, String), assuming a regular plural (just add an "s").
    static String
    withCount(long count, String singular, String plural)
    count followed by its agreeing word, e.g.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • agree

      public static String agree(long count, String singular, String plural)
      The singular or plural form of a word, agreeing with count (plural for every count but 1 and -1).

    • agree

      public static String agree(long count, String singular)
      Same as agree(long, String, String), assuming a regular plural (just add an "s").

    • withCount

      public static String withCount(long count, String singular, String plural)
      count followed by its agreeing word, e.g. withCount(1, "minute") → "1 minute", withCount(5, "minute") → "5 minutes".

    • withCount

      public static String withCount(long count, String singular)
      Same as withCount(long, String, String), assuming a regular plural (just add an "s").
